name: pixel-art-showcase-mern
description: Kaushal Mayani portfolio — MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix client
